title: Mission to Ord Mantell (Dash Rendar)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Mission to Ord Mantell}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Mission |prev=*[[Mission to Imdaar]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the events of the ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' series after ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' and [[Star Wars (1977) 69|''Star Wars'' (1977) 69]]. *[[Battle of the City of Bone]] *[[Dogfight over Tatooine]][[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]] |conc= |next=[[Battle of Gall]] |image=[[File:Dash_vs_IG-88D.jpg]] |name=Mission to Ord Mantell |conflict=[[Rescue of Han Solo]] |objective=Seek, interrogate, and if necessary, destroy IG-88D |date=[[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |place=[[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] |result=IG-88D destroyed; information on Fett gained. |side1=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |side2=[[IG-88's Droid Army]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] |commanders2=[[IG-88D/Legends|IG-88D]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=[[LE-BO2D9]] (Leebo) |ppl2=*[[Mercenary/Legends|Mercenaries]] *[[Airspeeder/Legends|Airspeeders]] *Drones *[[Dogbot]]s |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=None |casual2=IG-88D destroyed, along with some droid drones and mercenaries protecting him |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|A hover train runs through the junkyard and leads to the loading door. The door is closed, but if you reach the hover train's engine car, I can shut off the auto-brake remotely and easily crash the train through the door.''"
"''Easy, you say?|[[LE-BO2D9|Leebo]] and [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]]|}} The '''Second Mission to Ord Mantell''' was an operation conducted by [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]], who was sent by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to seek out [[IG-88D/Legends|IG-88D]], one of four [[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88 assassin droids]]. His objective was to interrogate the droid about the whereabouts of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who was holding [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], one of Rendar's friends and key [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]], hostage in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]]. ==Background== IG-88D was engaged in an [[Dogfight over Tatooine|aerial battle]] with Boba Fett over [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. After the rough skirmish, the [[IG-2000/Legends|''IG-2000'']] was caught in a barrage of fire from the [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]. With that, IG-88D managed to limp off to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] to search for spare parts for his ship in the planet's [[Scraplands/Legends|scrapyard]]. Knowing IG-88 would know information on Fett's location, Rendar gathered information on the skirmish and tracked IG-88 to Ord Mantell, where he landed the [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']] in the scrapyard. ==The skirmish== {{Quote|I've been monitoring you, Captain Rendar. You were correct to assume that following me would lead you to Boba Fett, but you are mistaken to believe you will claim the Rebels' reward for his location. You are outmatched.''"
"''Sounds like you got your wires crossed, IG-88.''"
"''As there is a zero percentage probability that you will survive this encounter, I see no risk in informing you that I have tracked my esteemed competitor to the Zhar system, where he will soon lose Captain Solo to me. Now, I must control this interruption. You will detain me no further''|[[IG-88D/Legends|IG-88D]] and [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]]|}} IG-88 was in the main salvage plant, and he sealed the gate. [[LE-BO2D9]], Rendar's assistant [[Droid/Legends|droid]] also known as Leebo, programmed a [[Hovertrain/Legends|hovertrain]] to kamikaze with the plant, allowing Rendar access. The assassin droid was prepared, though, and set up defenses along the hover train tracks consisting of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]], drones, and [[dogbot]]s. They proved defenseless to Rendar, who broke through the resistance and boarded the train on course with the processing plant. After a quick discussion with IG-88, information was gathered that Fett was on [[Gall/Legends|Gall]], and the assassin droid opened fire. IG-88 was blasted after a long, hard skirmish, and his inoperative droid shell fell to the ground. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Dash is kind of a shady character himself, so he knows where these shady characters like to hang out, so he comes to this place that's kind of a spaceship junkyard.|[[Jon Knoles]]|}} The Mission is described in a story outline from April 17, [[1995]]. Ord Mantell was chosen after its mention in {{Film|5}}, where [[Han Solo]] mentioned an encounter with bounty hunters. According to the game designers, Dash Rendar, who moves in similar circles as Han Solo, would seek other "shady characters" for information.''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' [[Paul Topolos]] made concept sketches for the salvage factory. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]] ==Sources== *''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]'' {{CardGameSet|set={{Topps|set=1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|parent=1}}|cards= *{{Topps|set=1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|cardname=Dash Battles IG-88 on Ord Mantell|link=https://www.rebelscum.com/photo.asp?image=/sote/soteTC100.jpg}} *{{Topps|set=1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|cardname=Dash Rides Ord Mantell Hovertrain|link=https://www.rebelscum.com/photo.asp?image=/sote/soteTC099.jpg}} }} *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire Limited Collector's Edition|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' Limited Collector's Edition]] *{{FFGTCG|set=Balance of the Force|cardname=Rendar's Wrath}} {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW_3_ABY_2}} {{Interlang |es=Tercera Misión a Ord Mantell }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ord Mantell (Dash Rendar), mission to}} [[Category:Battles of Ord Mantell]] [[Category:Events of the Galactic Civil War]]
